name: webcam-snap-marketplace
description: Marketplace hosting the webcam-snap plugin: let the agent take and analyze photos from a local webcam via ffmpeg, on Linux, macOS, or Windows.

plugins.name: webcam-snap
plugins.description: Take a photo from the local webcam with ffmpeg, then let the agent view and analyze it. Cross-platform (Linux/macOS/Windows). Triggers on 'take a photo', 'selfie', '拍照', '看看现在的环境'.
